recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: A former American G.I. joins a yakuza family after his release from prison in post-World War II Osaka.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Lifeboat
recommendations.overview: During World War II, a small group of survivors is stranded in a lifeboat together after the ship they were traveling on is destroyed by a German U-boat.

recommendations.title: Escape to Victory
recommendations.overview: A group of POWs in a German prison camp during World War II play the German National Soccer Team in this powerful film depicting the role of prisoners during wartime.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Exception
recommendations.overview: Nothing is as it seems in this riveting World War 2 thriller as a wary soldier goes to investigate a mysterious German monarch at his secluded mansion, leading him into a web of deceit and a dangerous love affair with a local Jewish woman.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.
